profile.positioningStatement: End-to-end systems ownership: application development, backend architecture, distributed processing, cloud infrastructure, DevOps automation, and production operations.

professionalSummary: Full-stack systems and DevOps engineer with 4 years of hands-on experience designing, building, deploying, and scaling production-grade systems. Strongest positioning in end-to-end systems ownership spanning application development, backend architecture, distributed processing, cloud infrastructure, DevOps automation, and production operations. Engineering approach is load-driven and operationally grounded: starting lean when business problems require speed, then evolving systems toward modular or distributed architecture when real scale, reliability, or operational needs justify added complexity. Emphasizes observable systems, reproducible infrastructure, explicit failure handling, horizontal scalability, and recoverable production workflows.

professionalExperience.overview: Design and implement cloud-native backend infrastructure, CI/CD pipelines, automation systems, distributed backend services, and production deployment workflows.
responsibilities: Design and implement cloud-native backend infrastructure on AWS
Build and maintain CI/CD pipelines using Jenkins and GitLab CI/CD
Develop Infrastructure as Code solutions using CloudFormation and Terraform
Configure containerized deployments using Docker and AWS ECS
Build event-driven backend services using AWS SNS, SQS, and EventBridge
Implement observability using CloudWatch, OpenTelemetry, Prometheus, Grafana, and Loki
Automate software delivery, deployment, monitoring, and operational workflows
Improve security, deployment reliability, and production automation

professionalExperience.overview: Develop modern React and React Native applications for multiple client projects, focusing on user experience, reusable components, API integration, and scalable frontend architecture.
responsibilities: Develop React and React Native applications
Build reusable UI components and application layouts
Integrate REST APIs and backend services
Implement authentication and role-based workflows
Manage application state and frontend architecture
Optimize application performance and responsiveness
Collaborate with backend developers and designers

professionalExperience.overview: Develop a React Native mobile commerce application integrated with a headless Shopify backend.
responsibilities: Develop mobile application features using React Native
Integrate Shopify GraphQL APIs
Build product catalog and order management workflows
Synchronize inventory and order information
Improve application performance and usability
Collaborate with backend and product teams

projects.name: Tender Procurement Intelligence Platform
projects.businessDomain: Procurement intelligence and government tender data extraction
projects.architectureStyle: Queue-based distributed worker system with Playwright automation and ETL pipelines
projects.overview: Queue-based Playwright worker platform that automated tender extraction and ETL processing across 50+ government portals, completing batches in about 5 minutes.
engineeringContributions: Designed a distributed scraping system with 20 parallel workers completing full extraction and processing cycles in about 5 minutes per batch
Automated procurement data extraction across 50+ government portals using queue-based Playwright workers and ETL pipelines
Built queue-based Playwright workers and ETL pipelines for 50+ government portals
Implemented validation, transformation, and deduplication workflows for extracted data
Used distributed worker fleets to reduce manual effort and cycle time
measurableOutcomes: 20 parallel workers completing extraction and processing cycles in about 5 minutes per batch
Automated data extraction across 50+ government portals
Reduced processing from hours of manual effort to about 5-minute automated cycles

engineeringContributions: Designed and implemented event-driven architecture using AWS CloudFormation, ECS Fargate, SNS/SQS, MongoDB, Redis pub/sub, OpenTelemetry, X-Ray, Prometheus, and Loki

Implemented comprehensive observability using Prometheus, Grafana, OpenTelemetry, CloudWatch, AWS X-Ray, and Loki
Used SNS/SQS for asynchronous buffering and decoupling
Used ECS Fargate for containerized worker execution
Used Redis pub/sub for real-time communication
Implemented retry logic, dead-letter queues, circuit breakers, and failure isolation
measurableOutcomes: Reduced full environment provisioning to single-command deployment using Infrastructure as Code
Improved failure isolation, monitoring, traceability, and recoverability
Built stateless architectures enabling seamless horizontal scaling with zero downtime

projects.name: News Chunk

engineeringContributions: Implemented a layered processing architecture with multi-source web scraping, AI classification engine, Flask REST API, and React-based unified timeline interface
Built multi-source data aggregation and transformation pipelines with validation and deduplication
Used AI classification instead of rule-based tagging for scalability
Decoupled scraping layer from API layer for maintainability
Built unified timeline abstraction instead of per-source feeds
Normalized content schema to handle heterogeneous inputs
measurableOutcomes: Unified access to multiple news sources with AI-driven categorization
Reduced cognitive load in information consumption through structured, categorized feeds
Faster discovery of relevant news through intelligent classification and unified timeline interface
